sme_leads.notes: Operates solely through Facebook and Instagram with no website or domain — a clear gap for a local cafe wanting to attract walk-ins and online orders.
Every directory lists their Facebook URL as their 'website' — no independent domain exists, making them invisible to anyone Googling for a barber in Shirley.
Relies entirely on Facebook and Fresha for bookings with no independent website, meaning zero SEO presence and no owned online brand.
Recently registered independent Greek-inspired cafe with presence only on Facebook, Instagram, and automated menu aggregators — no owned web presence at all.
NAPIT-registered sole trader listed only on Yell with no own website, severely limiting their ability to generate leads beyond word of mouth and directory listings.

linkedin_prospects.name: Holly Saywood
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Director / Associate Director
linkedin_prospects.reason: Leads a team of 10+ sales consultants at a UK construction recruitment agency (51-200 employees), ideal for CloseCoach cold-outreach and objection-handling training.

linkedin_prospects.name: Paul Stead
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: Manages a 7-rep automotive sales team at a North East UK car dealership where monthly targets and face-to-face negotiation make AI roleplay coaching a direct performance lever.

linkedin_prospects.name: Greg Tighe
linkedin_prospects.title: Director (Operations & Sales)
linkedin_prospects.reason: Oversees a dedicated sales department at a UK SME insurance broker — a consultative-selling environment where CloseCoach modules would directly improve broker conversion rates.

dts.title: DVSA wait times are 6+ months — here's how to get your test date in weeks
dts.description: Screen-record the DTS swap flow from sign-up to confirmed earlier date, narrated over punchy text overlays. Hook: learners already frustrated by long waiting lists.

dts.title: POV: you passed your driving test 3 months early
dts.description: Testimonial-style clip or thread where a real DTS user shares their story of grabbing a cancellation slot — humanises the product and drives word-of-mouth sign-ups.

athletics.title: Calisthenics to Sprint Power — does gym strength carry to the track?
athletics.description: Film a muscle-up or weighted L-sit session one day, then a 60m acceleration block the next. Voiceover explaining the hip-flexor and core carry-over — shareable across calisthenics and sprint communities.

athletics.title: My pre-sprint activation routine
athletics.description: Compact warm-up sequence — hip flexor openers, ankle circles, A-skips, wall drives — with on-screen labels. Low effort to film, evergreen content, strong save-rate from athletes who want to steal the routine.

aimybiz.title: I gave my AI sales coach a cold call script. Here's what it said.
aimybiz.description: Share a screenshot of CloseCoach feedback on a real (or demo) cold call script — highlight one specific insight on pacing, question ratio, or objection handling. Ends with a CTA to try it. Speaks directly to sales managers reviewing team call quality.

aimybiz.title: Watch CloseCoach roleplay a discovery call live
aimybiz.description: Screen-record CloseCoach playing the prospect in a discovery call roleplay, with Dowayne as the sales rep. Pause to show the AI feedback panel. Ideal hook for sales managers who want to see AI training in action before committing.
